author: Luis Dehlwes
name: Depth Recurrence 3x5 768dim
blurb: Depth recurrence: 3 unique transformer blocks repeated 5x for 15 effective layers at 768-dim width. Per-effective-layer adaptive scales (attn_scale, mlp_scale, resid_mix) allow specialization with minimal parameter overhead. ~12.6M params under 16MB int8+zlib.
